message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PFD flow between Openness and 5G core

actor "Admin" as admin
package "OpenNESS Controller Components" {
    participant "UI/CLI" as ui
    participant "Af Microservice" as af
}
package "5G Core Components" {
    participant "NEF" as nef
    participant "NGC CP Function" as ngc
    note right of nef: OpenNESS provided\nCore component with\nlimited functionality
}

rectangle "Get all transactions with PFD" as frame1 {
    admin -> ui : Request all PFD transactions
    activate ui
    ui -> af : af/v1/pfd/transaction GET
    activate af
    af -> nef : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/ GET
    activate nef
    nef -> nef : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    deactivate nef
    nef --> af : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
    deactivate af
    af --> ui : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
    deactivate ui
    ui --> admin : PFD details
}

rectangle "Get transactions with transactionId" as frame2 {
    admin -> ui : Request transaction with transactionId
    activate ui
    ui -> af : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId} GET
    activate af
    af -> nef : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId} GET
    activate nef
    nef -> nef : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    deactivate nef
    nef --> af : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
    deactivate af
    af --> ui : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
    deactivate ui
    ui --> admin : PFD details
}

rectangle "Get transactions with applicationId" as frame3 {
    admin -> ui : Request transactions with applicationId
    activate ui
    ui -> af : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId} GET
    activate af
    af -> nef : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId} GET
    activate nef
    nef -> nef : NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    deactivate nef
    nef --> af : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
    deactivate af
    af --> ui : OK: PFD information \ ERROR
    deactivate ui
    ui --> admin : PFD details
}

footer Proprietary and Confidential
right Intel Corporation
@enduml
```
